message:
fix(security): clean up stale key_zone_bindings on zone deletion

delete_zone cleaned up tenant_bindings and resource_zone_map but left
key_zone_bindings intact, allowing validate_key_zone to succeed for
keys bound to deleted zones. Now removes the zone from all key binding
lists and prunes empty entries. Regression test added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
